series_metadata.series_description: Quarterly financial reports (unaudited) from state colleges and universities. Schedule QF: Quarterly Report of Financial Actions; Schedule QF-2: Statement of Current Funds Revenues, Expenditures, and Other Changes Year to Date; Certification Form; and Quarterly letters

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: May be scanned to the L: drive and then destroyed. If the records are not scanned, retain 3 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
